1.4.9.evidence: No raster tags rendered in component output.

2.1.3.evidence: Component uses a native focusable element (<button>, <a>, <input>, <textarea>, <select>) for primary interaction.

2.3.3.evidence: Component has 1 transition + 1 animation declaration(s) and at least one @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) guard.

3.2.5.evidence: No auto-submit on focus, no location mutation in focus/input handlers.

3.3.6.evidence: Form-associated submission trigger (aria-pattern=button) with no user-entered data value.

forced-colors.evidence: @media (forced-colors: active) guard present; system colors used (CanvasText / ButtonText / etc.); forced-color-adjust property declared

apg-keyboard.evidence: @aria-pattern="button" — component renders a native element that provides the canonical keyboard contract via the user agent (no custom handler required).

1.4.6.evidence: 7.03:1 (fg rgb(255, 255, 255), bg rgb(15, 99, 99)); axe color-contrast-enhanced sweep: 0 violations across full story DOM.

2.4.12.evidence: No element covers the focused target center.

2.4.13.evidence: computed outline 2px solid rgb(15, 112, 120) (keyboard-focused via Tab×1 on <button> (shadow descendant of <hx-button> — focus ring rendered on inner part))
